text: The new rewards dashboard keeps crashing every time I try to redeem points. Completely broken.
Hey @PurpleMerit why is the app so slow now? Took 30 seconds to load my rewards page ðŸ˜¤
Love the new look of the rewards dashboard! Much cleaner UI. Keep it up.
My payment failed twice after the update. I was charged but didn't get my reward credits. Please fix ASAP.
Finally! The new rewards feature is exactly what I wanted. Super intuitive.
App crashes every single time I open the rewards tab. iPhone 13, iOS 17. Unusable.
PurpleMerit just lost my trust. Tried to redeem my reward, payment failed, support takes 2 days to respond. Switching to competitor.
The dashboard looks good but it's laggy. Hope they fix the performance issues soon.
Charged twice for the same reward redemption. This is unacceptable. Need an immediate refund.
Used to work fine. Since the update, I can't even complete the rewards setup. Stuck on step 2 of 4.
The gamification elements in the new dashboard are fun! Enjoying the streak feature.
Anyone else seeing massive slowdowns in PurpleMerit today? My rewards page takes forever to load.
Payment gateway error code 502 keeps appearing. Cannot complete any transactions since the update.
1 star. App crashes. Payment fails. Support doesn't respond. What happened to this product?
I'm seeing a completely blank rewards screen. My 5000 points have disappeared. This is a serious bug.
Cancelled my PurpleMerit subscription today. The new update broke everything. Very disappointed.
New rewards dashboard is a great idea but needs performance work. Crashes sometimes but I see the potential.
The onboarding flow for the new feature is confusing. Couldn't figure out step 3. Gave up after 10 minutes.
Mixed feelings. Love the concept of smart rewards but the execution needs work. Hoping for a fix soon.
@PurpleMerit is the rewards feature down? Getting error 502 constantly. Several of my friends have same issue.
Critical bug: selecting a reward tier causes the app to freeze and crash. Reproducible every time on Android 14.
Really impressed with the personalized recommendations in the rewards dashboard. Feels very premium.
Update broke the app. Crash on launch for me. Please roll back or patch quickly.
PurpleMerit rewards dashboard is a disaster. Slow, crashes, payment issues. Who QA'd this release?
Lost all my accumulated reward points after the update. Balance shows zero. This is a data integrity issue!
The new UI is beautiful and the rewards catalog is much richer. Just needs to be faster.
DO NOT UPDATE. Crashes constantly, payment failures, and support is overwhelmed. Wait for a fix.
Genuinely love what PurpleMerit is trying to do with the rewards system. Hope they sort the bugs out fast.
The rewards redemption page shows incorrect point balances. My account shows different values on web vs app.
Interesting new feature but I'll wait till it's stable before using it. Too many reports of issues from friends.
